item.title: Cleaner Clamp-Up for a Better Bench
item.description: A cleaner clamp-up can change the way the whole bench works.

media:content.media:description: A cleaner clamp-up can change the way the whole bench works.

item.title: A Small Rethink in Metalworking
item.description: A small rethink can turn junk metal into something worth keeping. A calm look at blacksmithing, tool restoration, and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: A Small Rethink in Metalworking
media:content.media:description: A small rethink can turn junk metal into something worth keeping. A calm look at blacksmithing, tool restoration, and metalworking.

item.title: Simple Setup for a Clean Metal Twist
item.description: A simple setup makes the metal move cleaner than you’d expect.

media:content.media:title: Simple Setup for a Clean Metal Twist
media:content.media:description: A simple setup makes the metal move cleaner than you’d expect.

item.title: Organic Forging from Tubing
item.description: A blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focusing on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

media:content.media:title: Organic Forging from Tubing
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing look at organic forging from tubing, focusing on shaping, heat, and traditional metalwork technique.

item.title: A Small Shop Fix for Hook Storage
item.description: A small shop fix that saves time every time I reach for a hook.

media:content.media:description: A small shop fix that saves time every time I reach for a hook.

item.title: Butterfly Hinges: Fit and Movement
item.description: The fit and movement are the satisfying part here—watch it come together in this blacksmithing and metalworking process.

media:content.media:title: Butterfly Hinges: Fit and Movement
media:content.media:description: The fit and movement are the satisfying part here—watch it come together in this blacksmithing and metalworking process.

item.title: Simple Tool Restoration in the Forge
item.description: A simple restore that keeps good steel working a little longer.
